name: tool-call-rendering
question: How to display tool calls for live progress tracking?
decision: Use AI SDK message.parts with typed tool parts (tool-{toolName}). Render based on part.state: input-streaming shows spinner, input-available shows tool name + params, output-available shows result, output-error shows error. Create ToolCallPart component.
rationale: AI SDK 4.2+ provides rich tool call state via message.parts. Superior to current toolCalls array approach. Shows real-time progress as Claude executes Wavesmith tools.
